publisher: Western Interchange Reliability Authority (fixture grid operator)
document: 2025 Curtailment and Congestion Report — Data Extract
notes: Curtailment is concentrated: five transmission-constrained zones account for 72 percent of 2025 curtailed energy.
Median duration of curtailment events in constrained zones was 3.4 hours.
Negative locational prices occurred in constrained zones during 9.1 percent of 2025 hours.
